---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Publications — Seth Watts"
page-layout: full

listing:
  - id: articles
    contents: "articles/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    page-size: 100
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    fields: [date, title, subtitle]

date-format: "YYYY"
---

```{r load-stats}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

stats <- tryCatch(
  yaml::read_yaml("data/scholar_stats.yml"),
  error = function(e) list(
    citations_all = "—",
    h_index_all   = "—",
    i10_index_all = "—"
  )
)

pubs_n <- tryCatch({
  nrow(read.csv("data/publications.csv"))
}, error = function(e) "—")
```

<div class="page-hero-slim">

<p class="hero-affiliation" style="margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Research</p>
<h1>Publications</h1>
<p>Compiled automatically from <a href="https://openalex.org/" target="_blank">OpenAlex</a> via ORCID. Updated biweekly.</p>

```{r stats-html}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

cat(paste0(
'<div class="stats-row" style="margin-top:1.5rem;">',
'<div class="stat-card">',
'<span class="stat-number">', stats$citations_all, '</span>',
'<span class="stat-label">Citations</span>',
'</div>',
'<div class="stat-card">',
'<span class="stat-number">', stats$h_index_all, '</span>',
'<span class="stat-label">h-index</span>',
'</div>',
'<div class="stat-card">',
'<span class="stat-number">', stats$i10_index_all, '</span>',
'<span class="stat-label">i10-index</span>',
'</div>',
'<div class="stat-card">',
'<span class="stat-number">', pubs_n, '</span>',
'<span class="stat-label">Publications</span>',
'</div>',
'</div>'
))
```

</div>

::: {#articles}
:::
